faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers to common moving questions
faqs.q1: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.a1: We recommend booking at least 3-5 days in advance for local moves. For international relocations, 2-3 weeks is ideal. However, we also accommodate urgent same-day moves when availability allows.
faqs.a2: Absolutely not. Our pricing is transparent. The hourly rate covers the van, driver, and movers as specified in your package. VAT (21%) is added on top. Time is calculated from departure to return to our Maastricht location.
faqs.a3: Yes! All students get free ride-along service within Maastricht. Just show your student ID on moving day. We also offer special student-friendly pricing for small moves.
faqs.q4: What if something gets damaged during the move?
faqs.a4: All our moves include transport insurance. In the rare event of damage, we have a straightforward claims process. Our team is trained in professional handling techniques to minimize any risk.
faqs.q5: Can I ride along in the moving van?
faqs.a5: Yes! Within Maastricht it is €10 fixed. Outside Maastricht (25-50km) it is €0.50/km. Students ride free within Maastricht. For long-distance moves, we provide a custom quote.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How early should I book my move?
faq.a1: We recommend booking at least 2-4 weeks in advance, especially during peak seasons.
faq.q2: Are my items insured during the move?
faq.a2: Yes, all moves include comprehensive insurance coverage for your peace of mind.
faq.a3: Absolutely! We can provide high-quality boxes, tape, and protective wrap.
